The '''''Etherway''''' was one of [[Talon Karrde]]'s [[Starship/Legends|starships]]. It was a modified [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]] [[Action V transport]]. It sometimes operated under the alias ''[[Etherway|Garret's Gold]]''. The ''Etherway'' was present at the [[Smugglers' Alliance]] meeting on [[Hijarna]]. After being impounded on [[Abregado-rae/Legends|Abregado-rae]], [[Aves]] piloted it during the [[Battle of Bilbringi (9 ABY)|Battle of Bilbringi]]. While trying to rescue a group of [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] students at [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]], its power grid shut down and may have been destroyed by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]].

{{Ship-stub}}
